历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 8744 → 26103 → 14031 → 12241 → 9341, showing a continuous upward trend in recent three years (decreasing ranking numbers). The 2025 baseline is about 9341. The provincial science group enrollment plan from 2021 to 2024 was 45–51 students, adjusted to 43 in 2025, and remains at 43 in 2026, unchanged from the previous year.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising, reaching 72nd in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition. In recent years, its reputation has been stable with no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 96th, rated as average, showing no signs of excessive or insufficient application enthusiasm. Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, and Textile Science and Engineering is a traditional flagship. Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information are also offered.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in the province is about 167,400, a decrease of approximately 5,900 from 2025, slightly easing competition. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, offering a clear geographical advantage. Its enrollment plan in the province is stable, making it attractive to Shanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the steady rise in university ranking, the unchanged enrollment plan, and the slight decrease in provincial examinees, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the science group in 2026 will continue to move slightly upward from the 2025 baseline of 9341. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9291, with a range of 8791–9791.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (8791–9791), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8500), you can focus on reaching for flagship majors like Electronic Information and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 9700), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety and be cautious with popular majors.
